title: Minefinity (Legacy)
description: This Mod is Outdated. A brand new version will come out soon!
body:
This Mod is Outdated. A brand new version will come out soon!


A mod inspired by Around the Minecraft World in 80 Biomes, An official Minecraft webseries. You will find Giant head resembling Mobbo, The series mascot. Inside the heads, You will find the Minefinity stones. Try To Collect four of each to summon A Boss, Johnathan Minecraft, who has come back for revenge! Craft his signature weapon, The Minefinity Gauntlet if you wan't to stand a chance against him. There is also a forest inhabited by mostly Allays where You can find a new wood type and new ore.

This took three months to make. Made in MCreator

Final and Recommended Version was 5.1.3 for Neoforge 1.21.4.
